case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FLETCHER, LUCY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER COURT ORDER OF 07/23/04.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER, LUCY DEFENDANT HAS PAID THE AMOUNT IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,970.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER, LUCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-30-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-29-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONT'D EVERY 6 MOS. UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL & CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200/MONTH BEGINNING ON
- JULY 23, 2004 & ON THE 23RD DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER, LUCY
